title: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

notes:
This is a multi-stage event with 5 levels of deciphering. Once you choose to decipher, you enter a loop where each stage requires increasing Max HP loss and you can choose to continue or give up after each stage:

**Stage Progression:**
- **Stage 1**: Lose 3 Max HP, [gold]upgrade[/gold] 1 random card
- **Stage 2**: Lose 6 Max HP, [gold]upgrade[/gold] 1 random card  
- **Stage 3**: Lose 12 Max HP, [gold]upgrade[/gold] 1 random card
- **Stage 4**: Lose 24 Max HP, [gold]upgrade[/gold] 1 random card
- **Stage 5** (Final): Lose all remaining Max HP (MaxHp - 1), [gold]upgrade ALL cards[/gold] in your deck, reveal the [gold]Final Word[/gold]: "[b]Air[/b]"

The Decipher option becomes locked if the HP cost would reduce your Max HP to 0 or below. If you survive all 5 stages, the full truth of the tablet is revealed: simply the word "Air".
